sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna lam sawt lua ka tawn khial

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong ciah ing, Hong ciah ing
Thupha tawh Nang aa hi ning

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hunpha tampi mawk bei sak ing
Tun kap in ki siak taktak ing

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhna lam pial cim tang Topa
Muang ning na itna leh thupha

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka kha cina, Ka lung meima
Hong dip kik in ka lawpna tha
